title: Orify
body:
![Orify](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c2cde8056b9d62972a7b8f4195aae12f29c776a.png)

[WIP] Orify elevates your mining adventures by introducing a variety of new, powerful ores, each accompanied by unique special items. These ores enhance your gameplay, offering materials that surpass even netherite in strength and utility. With Orify, your mining possibilities are expanded!
__________________________________________________________________________________
![ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/463889a3dbae91b2d683c5faaf35b644d6f88740.png)

![Umbrium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9980bfa11c0c899fd42b6fa8bcc4ebe715ffb5f7.png)
__________________________________________________________________________________

![Flambrion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48412faa22fdfbeef171589554e05299a3fa3c0f.png)

__________________________________________________________________________________

![qna](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2043984e9d6589a629c0000d34c243f0f977c96.png)

Is there only going to be two ores? - No! This mod will be updated with many more ores!
Is this mod Vanilla friendly? - I would say Yes!
Does this Replace Normal Ores? - Nope!
Ask More!
